Design System
Foundations
  • Cores
  • Tipografia
System
  • Componentes
  • Padrões
Foundations

Cores

forest#145559Primary text, headings, borders on light
dark#0A2D30Deep contrast band backgrounds
accent#ADCF78Signal only — borders, labels, CTA
cream#F7F3DBOn-dark text and backgrounds
ink#191919Near-black body text
muted#6B7280Captions, secondary text
white#FFFFFFContent surfaces
surface-card#F0F4F0Slightly elevated surfaces
surface-dark#0A2D30Dark band surfaces
surface-forest#145559Brand marketing blocks

Bordas

border-lightrgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) — superfícies claras
border-darkrgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) — superfícies escuras
